Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-06 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long LINC dominates today's rankings with a score of 95.2 and rank #1, exhibiting exceptional long-term momentum across all timeframes—particularly its 10-year return of 1,562% and 5-year return of 561% that vastly outpace SPY's equivalent periods by 1,338% and 495% respectively. The stock passes all four momentum ratio thresholds and sits above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200), generating a "strong_buy" signal with a clean momentum flag and normal volatility profile. MPC ranks second but shows a materially different pattern: while it maintains solid 5-year (351%) and 10-year (553%) returns, its 6-month return (25.57%) significantly lags its 3-month return (46.18%), suggesting recent deceleration, and it notably underperforms SPY on a 10-year basis (328% vs SPY's projected gains). Both stocks have passed 4 of 4 ratio tests and trade above all key moving averages, but LINC's consistent acceleration across every time horizon and superior relative performance mark it as the cleaner long-term momentum play in today's scan.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
